sourceMovie.title: Geostorm
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Geostorm (2017) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Dean Devlin's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Terminator
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Geostorm clicked for you, The Terminator (1984) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Geostorm?
faq.answer: Try The Terminator, The Matrix Reloaded, Minority Report—each shares DNA with Geostorm while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Geostorm?
faq.answer: Geostorm (2017) is best described as Action, Science Fiction, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Geostorm worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
